title: Weekly Schedule Generator
scenario: Create a weekly schedule generator that takes in a user's tasks, appointments, and availability. The tool should output a formatted weekly schedule with the tasks, appointments, and availability. Ensure the format meets standard weekly schedule requirements.
constraints: Must use standard weekly schedule formatting

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated markdown adheres to the constraints.
Check if the tasks, appointments, and availability are included in the output.
Check if the generated markdown is correctly formatted.
